ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airport */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code where the airport is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the airport in a structured format */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "airport_type" TEXT /* Type of airport (e.g., international, domestic, private) */,
  "closeness_centrality" REAL /* Closeness centrality of the airport in the network */,
  "average_neighbor_degree" REAL /* Average degree of the airport's neighbors */,
  "degree_centrality" REAL /* Degree centrality of the airport in the network */,
  "pagerank" REAL /* PageRank score of the airport */,
  "hits_score" REAL /* HITS score of the airport */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree of the airport in the network */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the airport data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the airport (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Additional permissions or roles in a structured format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Role-specific permissions in a structured format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the arrival airport */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique flight number */,
  "airline" TEXT /* Name of the airline operating the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., scheduled, delayed, canceled) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the flight */,
  "booked_seats" INTEGER /* Number of booked seats */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flight record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)
